data.content_ref: inline:{"pairwise": {"decisive_point": "a single global critic decision (veto/allow) with fixed precision 0.125 and recall 1.0 yields zero net benefit because the critic flags everything, so filtering is a no-op on the already-correct majority", "loser": "5b4538abe4a712f8c9c0a33fe17fe62d43ac359f1375d97921d389955ef1f08a", "problem": "disc:pi-criticism", "winner": "30e483eb494067d8323a796b7e319a77a3abce4c45ba08a487df2b6838e5082b"}}
